description_long: This is a large, modern two-story house set on a rectangular plot with a manicured lawn and several trees. The structure features a flat roof, multiple balconies, and expansive windows that provide ample natural light. The rear of the house includes a spacious outdoor deck, a swimming pool, and a hot tub, creating a luxurious recreational area. The exterior is finished in a combination of white and dark brown panels, with clean lines and minimalistic detailing. The property includes a driveway leading to a covered carport and several landscaped areas with shrubs and decorative trees. The overall design emphasizes open outdoor living spaces and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor environments.
description: A modern two-story house with flat roofs, large windows, balconies, and a backyard pool, set on a landscaped plot with a driveway and trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, and a prominent balcony above the entryway, with landscaped lawn and trees.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard pool, hot tub, large deck, and multiple balconies, with trees lining the property edge.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the pool, deck, and extensive window arrangements, as well as the transition between white and dark brown exterior panels.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the carport, secondary entrance, and additional outdoor seating area, with a clear view of the driveway and lawn.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and balcony doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a wide door, covered porch, and balcony above, with minimalistic steps and landscaping.
